specs.title: cp-000: Toggles between newestoldest sort direction
cp-001: Date range FROM and TO date input fields
cp-002: Journal dropdown All journals default populated from available journals
cp-003: Sort by buttons 3-column Date published Added Title
cp-004: Clear all filters button visible only when filters active
cp-005: Active filters show blue highlight bg-brand10 text-brand border-brand20
cp-006: Glass panel with centered text Select an article to read
cp-007: Title text-lg font-bold
cp-008: Authors text-sm text-ink-muted
cp-009: Journal info Journal Vol X Issue Y text-xs
cp-010: Publication date Published date or Publication date unavailable
cp-011: Reading time estimate
cp-012: Header Abstract
cp-013: Content text-sm text-ink-muted leading-relaxed
cp-014: Hidden if no abstract available
cp-015: Format DOI doi with clickable link to httpsdoiorgdoi
cp-016: Hidden if no DOI
cp-017: NoteBlank icon Notes header
cp-018: Textarea with 3 rows
cp-019: Placeholder Add your notes about this article
cp-020: Auto-save after 1 second of inactivity
cp-021: Saves on blur if changes pending
cp-022: Saved indicator Check icon appears for 2 seconds after save
cp-023: Loads existing notes via GET apifeedsarticlesidnotes
cp-024: Saves via PUT apifeedsarticlesidnotes
cp-025: Find Related Papers button displayed

cp-028: List of related paper cards

cp-030: Authors Author1 Author2 et al Journal Year
